title: Hold That Kiss
writer: Stanley Rauh, Bradbury Foote, Jane Hall
actors: Maureen O'Sullivan, Dennis O'Keefe, Mickey Rooney
plot: June Evans, clothing model, and Tommy Bradford, travel agent, both dream of being rich. When they meet at millionaire, J. Westley Piermont's daughter's wedding, they both assume each other is wealthy. Each being there to do errand...
